task: Using only the provided embedded packet, sort spectral witness coupon records, produce an auditable evidence table, and decide lot disposition. Deliver two artifacts: (1) coating_yield_sort.csv containing record-level data, computed pass/fail scores, needs_review flags, and explicit governing-value citations and formulas (executable logic), and (2) lot_disposition.md containing disposition recommendation(s), reasoning, validation checks, sensitivity analysis (using sensitivity_shift_pct), unresolved assumptions, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review. Apply the following rules: treat any record with confidence < 0.70, missing provenance, or contradictory/under-supported data as needs_review even if numeric thresholds are met; do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; perform all calculations strictly from the embedded packet; mark any contradictory or under-supported record needs_review. Use the given limits (limit_reflectance_532_pct, limit_reflectance_1064_pct, limit_thickness_nm), decision_budget_usd, sensitivity_shift_pct, and hard_threshold_record_count when computing disposition logic.
